input_text: B40 tapi nak beli iPhone 15 Pro Max. Lepas tu komplen tak cukup duit nak makan. Priorities memang salah habis la korang ni.
reason: Mocks B40 spending choices with dismissive generalisation, implying they deserve financial hardship due to personal decisions.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan kewangan memang penting untuk semua golongan. Mungkin perlu lebih banyak program literasi kewangan untuk membantu masyarakat membuat pilihan yang bijak.

input_text: Orang B40 memang tak reti urus duit. Tengok la anak bersekolah tapi motor besar ada, Astro ada, tapi nak minta bantuan kerajaan.
reason: Stereotypes B40 families as financially irresponsible and undeserving of government aid.
suggested_rewrite: Cabaran kewangan golongan B40 memerlukan pemahaman yang lebih mendalam. Program bantuan kerajaan bertujuan memastikan keperluan asas dipenuhi.

input_text: Kahwin grand habis tapi lepas setahun dah cerai. Orang Melayu ni memang suka membazir duit kahwin je kerja.
reason: Generalises Malay wedding spending habits negatively and links them to divorce rates in a dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Perbelanjaan perkahwinan yang berlebihan boleh menambah tekanan kewangan. Mungkin pasangan perlu diberi bimbingan perancangan kewangan sebelum berkahwin.

input_text: Kawan aku ambil kursus seni lukis. Aku cakap la, baik jadi runner Grab lagi senang cari makan. Seni ni buat lapar je.
reason: Dismisses creative arts as a viable career path and belittles the friend's educational choice.
suggested_rewrite: Bidang seni memang mencabar dari segi kewangan, tapi ramai juga yang berjaya. Penting untuk menyokong pilihan kerjaya masing-masing.

input_text: Umur 35 tahun tapi masih single. Mesti ada something wrong dengan dia ni. Cerewet sangat kot pilih pasangan.
reason: Age-shames someone for being unmarried at 35, implying personal deficiency.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang mempunyai perjalanan hidup yang berbeza. Tidak ada had umur untuk mencari pasangan yang sesuai.

input_text: Unifi ni memang scam terbesar Malaysia. Bayar 300 sebulan tapi speed macam dial-up zaman 2000. TM patut malu.
reason: Labels Unifi as a scam with hyperbolic comparison, dismissing the entire service provider without constructive feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Kelajuan Unifi kadang-kadang tidak memenuhi jangkaan pengguna. Harap TM dapat menambah baik perkhidmatan agar setimpal dengan harga yang dibayar.

input_text: M40 konon la. Gaji RM5000 tapi lifestyle macam T20. Lepas tu mengeluh tak mampu beli rumah. Siapa suruh berlagak.
reason: Mocks M40 income earners for their lifestyle choices and blames them for housing affordability issues.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai golongan M40 menghadapi tekanan kewangan antara kos sara hidup dan impian memiliki rumah. Perlu ada perancangan kewangan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Budak sekarang nak jadi YouTuber la, TikToker la. Kerja betul taknak. Generasi pemalas memang macam ni.
reason: Dismisses content creation as not real work and labels an entire generation as lazy.
suggested_rewrite: Bidang penciptaan kandungan digital semakin berkembang dan menjadi sumber pendapatan yang sah. Generasi muda meneroka peluang kerjaya yang berbeza.

input_text: Kenduri kahwin 2000 orang tapi lauk ayam je. Baik tak payah jemput ramai-ramai. Malu je.
reason: Shames wedding hosts for serving simple food, implying they should be embarrassed by their budget limitations.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri kahwin bukan soal hidangan mewah tetapi soal meraikan kegembiraan bersama. Setiap keluarga merancang mengikut kemampuan masing-masing.

input_text: Dah la gaji ciput, nak buat loan kereta Vellfire. Orang B40 memang suka show off sampai masuk AKPK.
reason: Stereotypes B40 group as show-offs who make irresponsible financial decisions leading to debt counselling.
suggested_rewrite: Pemilihan kenderaan perlu sesuai dengan kemampuan kewangan. Program literasi kewangan boleh membantu semua golongan membuat keputusan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Unifi down lagi hari ni. Nak kerja dari rumah pun tak boleh. TM ni memang syarikat paling useless dalam Malaysia.
reason: Labels TM as the most useless company with a sweeping dismissal rather than a constructive complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan Unifi hari ini menjejaskan kerja dari rumah. Harap TM dapat memperbaiki kestabilan rangkaian secepat mungkin.

input_text: Umur 37 masih duduk dengan mak ayah. Tak malu ke? Orang lain dah ada keluarga sendiri.
reason: Shames someone for living with parents at 37, ignoring cultural norms and financial realities.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai rakyat Malaysia tinggal bersama keluarga atas pelbagai sebab termasuk kos sara hidup yang tinggi. Setiap orang mempunyai keadaan yang berbeza.

input_text: Anak aku nak ambil kursus muzik. Aku cakap baik belajar engineering. Muzik ni bukan kerjaya, hobi je tu.
reason: Dismisses music as a career, reducing it to merely a hobby and pressuring child into conventional career path.
suggested_rewrite: Bidang muzik boleh menjadi kerjaya yang berjaya jika ada minat dan usaha. Penting untuk menyokong anak sambil memberi panduan tentang peluang kerjaya.

input_text: Kenduri kahwin orang kampung memang la macam tu. Paksa semua orang datang tolong tapi makanan pun tak sedap.
reason: Looks down on kampung wedding culture and the gotong-royong tradition with classist disdain.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri kahwin di kampung mempunyai tradisi gotong-royong yang unik. Semangat kerjasama masyarakat patut dihargai.

input_text: Internet kat Malaysia ni memang memalukan. Negara jiran pun lagi laju. TM monopoli sampai rakyat yang susah.
reason: Broadly condemns Malaysian internet infrastructure and accuses TM of monopolistic harm without nuance.
suggested_rewrite: Kelajuan internet di Malaysia masih boleh ditingkatkan. Persaingan sihat antara penyedia perkhidmatan internet boleh membantu meningkatkan kualiti.

input_text: B40 buat kenduri besar-besar pastu minta sedekah online. Kalau tak mampu jangan buat la. Common sense pun takde.
reason: Shames B40 families for seeking financial help for celebrations, questioning their intelligence.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri adalah tradisi penting bagi ramai keluarga. Mungkin lebih baik menyesuaikan skala majlis mengikut kemampuan kewangan.

input_text: Dah 33 tahun masih nak couple sana couple sini. Bila nak serius ni? Orang lain dah ada anak dua tiga.
reason: Pressures someone about their relationship status by comparing them unfavourably to peers.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang mempunyai garis masa kehidupan yang berbeza. Perkahwinan bukan satu-satunya ukuran kejayaan hidup.

input_text: Graphic designer konon. Baik jadi kerani lagi stabil. Seni ni bukan untuk orang Malaysia, tak ada market.
reason: Dismisses graphic design as a career and claims creative industries have no market in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Industri reka bentuk grafik semakin berkembang di Malaysia. Penting untuk menghargai pelbagai pilihan kerjaya yang ada.

input_text: WiFi Unifi aku ni macam mood swing. Kejap ada kejap takde. Bayar mahal tapi servis macam sampah.
reason: Calls Unifi service 'trash' using hyperbolic frustration rather than constructive criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Kestabilan Unifi perlu diperbaiki kerana pengguna membayar untuk perkhidmatan yang konsisten. Harap TM dapat menangani isu ini.

input_text: Orang PPR beli kereta baru tapi rumah bersepah. Memang la B40 selama-lamanya kalau perangai macam ni.
reason: Judges PPR residents' spending and implies they deserve to remain in poverty.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan kewangan adalah cabaran untuk semua golongan pendapatan. Program bimbingan kewangan boleh membantu keluarga membuat keputusan yang lebih bijak.

input_text: Gaji baru RM3000 tapi nak pergi Jepun bercuti. Lepas tu komplen cost of living tinggi. Pandai sangat la korang ni.
reason: Sarcastically attacks lower-income earners for their travel choices, implying they have no right to complain about costs.
suggested_rewrite: Percutian ke luar negara memerlukan perancangan kewangan yang teliti. Penting untuk mengimbangi antara kehendak dan keperluan.

input_text: Kahwin umur 40? Mesti susah nak dapat anak nanti. Dah terlambat dah tu. Patut kahwin awal-awal.
reason: Shames someone for marrying at 40, making insensitive assumptions about fertility and life choices.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan pada usia yang lebih matang mempunyai kelebihan tersendiri. Setiap individu berhak membuat keputusan mengikut kesediaan masing-masing.

input_text: Hantaran RM25,000 tapi reception kat dewan komuniti. Priorities memang pelik la orang sekarang ni.
reason: Mocks wedding priorities by contrasting high hantaran with a modest venue, implying financial mismanagement.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap pasangan mempunyai keutamaan yang berbeza dalam perancangan perkahwinan. Yang penting adalah persetujuan kedua-dua pihak keluarga.

input_text: Kerja freelance photographer konon. Tak stabil pun nak bangga. Nanti tua tak ada EPF baru tau.
reason: Dismisses freelance photography as unstable and mocks the person's pride in their work.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja freelance memerlukan perancangan kewangan yang baik termasuk simpanan persaraan. Ramai pekerja bebas berjaya dalam bidang mereka.

input_text: Unifi speed test 5 Mbps je padahal plan 100 Mbps. TM ni memang penipu. Rompak duit rakyat je kerja.
reason: Accuses TM of fraud and theft with inflammatory language rather than filing a formal complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Kelajuan internet yang diterima tidak menepati pelan yang dilanggan. Pengguna berhak membuat aduan kepada TM dan MCMC untuk penyelesaian.

input_text: M40 komplen macam-macam tapi masih mampu beli kopi RM15 setiap hari. Hipokrit betul la golongan ni.
reason: Labels the entire M40 group as hypocrites based on coffee spending habits, a classist generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Golongan M40 menghadapi tekanan kewangan tersendiri walaupun mempunyai pendapatan sederhana. Setiap orang mengurus kewangan dengan cara berbeza.

input_text: Anak dia ambil kursus theatre kat universiti. Habis duit mak bapak je, keluar nanti kerja apa? Berlakon kat pasar malam ke?
reason: Sarcastically belittles theatre studies and implies it wastes parents' money with no career outcome.
suggested_rewrite: Pengajian teater membuka peluang dalam industri seni persembahan, media, dan pendidikan. Pelbagai kerjaya boleh diceburi selepas tamat pengajian.

input_text: Orang kampung nak kahwin mesti kena jemput satu kampung. Lepas tu hutang sana sini. Budaya yang tak masuk akal.
reason: Dismisses kampung wedding tradition of inviting the whole village as senseless, showing classist condescension.
suggested_rewrite: Tradisi menjemput seluruh kampung ke kenduri mencerminkan semangat kemasyarakatan. Namun, skala majlis perlu disesuaikan dengan kemampuan kewangan.

input_text: Umur dah 36 tapi masih nak belajar master. Orang lain dah jadi manager. Lambat sangat la kau ni.
reason: Shames someone for pursuing further education at 36 by unfavourably comparing them to peers.
suggested_rewrite: Mengejar pendidikan tinggi pada bila-bila usia adalah sesuatu yang patut dipuji. Pembelajaran sepanjang hayat membantu perkembangan kerjaya.

input_text: Streamyx dah la slow, Unifi pun sama je. Malaysia ni memang takkan maju kalau internet pun tak boleh settle.
reason: Uses internet issues to make sweeping claims about Malaysia's progress, an overly pessimistic and polarising take.
suggested_rewrite: Peningkatan infrastruktur internet adalah penting untuk pembangunan negara. Harap pihak berkaitan dapat mempercepatkan usaha ini.

input_text: B40 nak buat bisnes online tapi modal pun takde. Mimpi je la. Orang susah memang susah selama-lamanya.
reason: Dismisses B40 entrepreneurial aspirations as unrealistic dreams and implies poverty is permanent.
suggested_rewrite: Golongan B40 yang berminat berniaga online boleh mendapatkan bantuan modal melalui pelbagai program kerajaan dan NGO.

input_text: Orang M40 ni paling kesian. Nak kaya tak mampu, nak miskin malu. Terperangkap dalam lifestyle sendiri.
reason: Patronises the entire M40 group as pitiable and trapped, a reductive characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: Golongan M40 menghadapi cabaran unik dalam mengurus kewangan. Sokongan dan dasar yang sesuai boleh membantu mereka mencapai kestabilan kewangan.

input_text: Jangan kahwin orang kampung. Kenduri kena masak sendiri, penat je. Kahwin orang bandar senang, catering terus.
reason: Advises against marrying someone from the kampung based on wedding logistics, a classist urban-rural divide.
suggested_rewrite: Kenduri tradisional dan moden masing-masing mempunyai keindahan tersendiri. Yang penting adalah keserasian pasangan, bukan asal usul.

input_text: Technician TM datang lambat 3 jam. Pastu cakap kabel ok, masalah kat server. Alasan je memanjang.
reason: Accuses TM technician of making excuses and being unpunctual, generalising poor service.
suggested_rewrite: Kehadiran technician TM yang lewat memerlukan penambahbaikan. Pengguna mengharapkan ketepatan masa dan penjelasan yang lebih jelas mengenai masalah teknikal.

input_text: Dahlah gaji RM2500, nak kahwin grand macam anak dato. Lepas tu makan maggi sebulan. Padan muka.
reason: Uses 'padan muka' to shame someone for having an expensive wedding on a low salary, showing zero empathy.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan kewangan perkahwinan perlu realistik dengan pendapatan. Pasangan boleh merancang majlis yang bermakna tanpa berbelanja melebihi kemampuan.

input_text: These B40 families buying the latest Samsung Galaxy but can't even pay their kids' school fees. No wonder they stay poor forever.
reason: Blames B40 families for their poverty by pointing at phone purchases, a classist and dismissive generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Financial literacy programs could help families across all income groups make more balanced spending decisions, especially with technology purchases.

input_text: Malaysian weddings are just a competition to see who can waste the most money. RM100k for one night? Ridiculous.
reason: Reduces Malaysian wedding culture to wasteful competition without acknowledging cultural significance.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding budgets in Malaysia vary widely. Couples may benefit from guidance on planning meaningful celebrations within their means.

input_text: Imagine studying fine arts in 2025. Good luck working at Starbucks after graduation. Should have picked a real degree.
reason: Mocks fine arts students by implying they will end up in low-paying service jobs, dismissing creative education.
suggested_rewrite: Fine arts graduates can pursue diverse careers in design, advertising, education, and the creative economy. Every field has its own merits.

input_text: Still single at 38? Something must be really wrong with you la. Even the weird kids from school are married already.
reason: Aggressively age-shames someone for being single at 38 and implies personal deficiency.
suggested_rewrite: Being single at any age is a personal choice. Everyone has their own timeline for relationships and life milestones.

input_text: Unifi is honestly the worst ISP in Southeast Asia. Even Cambodia has better internet. What a joke of a company.
reason: Makes sweeping negative comparisons to belittle Malaysian internet infrastructure without constructive feedback.
suggested_rewrite: Internet speeds in Malaysia could be improved compared to regional benchmarks. Constructive feedback to MCMC and TM can help drive change.

input_text: M40 people are the biggest pretenders in Malaysia. Drive a BMW but eat at mamak every day because they're actually broke.
reason: Labels M40 as pretenders and mocks their financial reality with a classist stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Many M40 earners balance aspirational purchases with budget-conscious daily choices. Financial pressures affect different income groups in different ways.

input_text: My cousin wants to be a musician. I told him straight - there's no future in music in Malaysia. Get a proper job la.
reason: Dismisses music as having no future in Malaysia, pressuring someone away from their passion.
suggested_rewrite: The music industry in Malaysia is growing with streaming platforms and live events. It's important to support musicians while also planning financially.

input_text: You're 34 and still renting? That's embarrassing la. Most people your age already have their own house.
reason: Shames someone for renting at 34, ignoring the reality of high property prices in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Many Malaysians rent due to high property prices. Home ownership timelines vary based on individual financial circumstances.

input_text: TM technicians are so useless. They come, press some buttons, say 'already fixed' and then the same problem comes back next week.
reason: Calls technicians useless and dismisses their work, a sweeping attack on frontline workers.
suggested_rewrite: Recurring internet issues after technician visits are frustrating. TM should improve their diagnostic procedures to ensure lasting fixes.

input_text: B40 kids wearing branded shoes to school but parents say cannot afford tuition. The priorities of poor people in this country smh.
reason: Judges B40 parents for children's clothing while dismissing their financial struggles with 'poor people' label.
suggested_rewrite: Balancing children's needs and wants is a challenge for all families. Access to affordable tuition should be improved regardless of income level.

input_text: Malaysian Indian weddings last three days. Who has time for that? Just get married in one day and be done with it la.
reason: Dismisses Indian wedding traditions as unnecessarily long, showing disrespect for cultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: Different cultures have their own wedding traditions that hold deep meaning. Multi-day celebrations are an important part of some communities' heritage.

input_text: Why do people still study literature or philosophy? Those degrees are completely useless in Malaysia's job market.
reason: Dismisses humanities education as useless, ignoring the diverse career paths these degrees enable.
suggested_rewrite: Literature and philosophy degrees develop critical thinking skills valued across many industries. The job market is broader than it appears for humanities graduates.

input_text: Paying RM200 for 100Mbps Unifi but getting 10Mbps during peak hours. TM should be sued for false advertising honestly.
reason: Suggests legal action with inflammatory tone over internet speed issues rather than using formal complaint channels.
suggested_rewrite: Internet speeds dropping during peak hours is a common frustration. Filing complaints with MCMC can help hold providers accountable for advertised speeds.

input_text: At 36, she's finally getting married. Better late than never I guess, but honestly most men don't want older brides.
reason: Age-shames a woman getting married at 36 with a sexist implication about her desirability.
suggested_rewrite: Getting married at 36 is wonderful. Love and partnership have no age limit, and maturity often strengthens relationships.

input_text: My friend quit her accounting job to become a painter. I give her six months before she comes crawling back to corporate.
reason: Predicts failure for a friend pursuing art, using demeaning language about her career change.
suggested_rewrite: Career changes take courage. While transitioning from accounting to painting is challenging, many artists build successful careers with dedication.

input_text: Chinese weddings in Malaysia are just about the ang pow. If you don't give enough, they'll talk about you behind your back.
reason: Reduces Chinese wedding culture to monetary exchanges and gossip, a dismissive ethnic stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Ang pow is a traditional gesture of goodwill at Chinese weddings. The amount given is a personal choice, and the celebration is about sharing joy.

input_text: People from PPR flats acting like they live in a condo. Put up curtains and decorations but the whole block smells terrible.
reason: Mocks PPR residents for trying to improve their living spaces while insulting their environment.
suggested_rewrite: PPR residents who personalise their homes show pride in their living spaces. Maintenance issues in public housing should be addressed by authorities.

input_text: Unifi customer service keeps putting me on hold for 45 minutes. These people are trained to waste your time and do nothing.
reason: Accuses customer service staff of deliberately wasting time, attacking frontline workers personally.
suggested_rewrite: Long hold times with Unifi customer service are frustrating. TM should invest in improving their support infrastructure to reduce wait times.

input_text: Imagine being 35 and your parents still asking when you're getting married at every family gathering. Maybe she's just undateable la.
reason: Calls someone 'undateable' for being single at 35, reinforcing hurtful social pressure.
suggested_rewrite: Family pressure about marriage can be stressful. It's important to respect that everyone has their own pace when it comes to relationships.

input_text: Art school graduates expecting RM5000 salary. Delusional. Even engineers struggle to get that much starting out.
reason: Labels art school graduates as delusional for having salary expectations, dismissing their qualifications.
suggested_rewrite: Salary expectations should align with industry standards regardless of field. Both creative and technical graduates face challenges in the job market.

input_text: The B40 families in my area all have Astro with full package but say they can't afford their children's books. Make it make sense.
reason: Judges B40 entertainment spending while questioning their financial hardship claims in a dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Household spending priorities vary across families. Affordable access to both education materials and entertainment is important for family wellbeing.

input_text: Malay weddings are the worst. So many pantang larang, the couple can't even enjoy their own wedding. What's the point?
reason: Dismisses Malay wedding customs as pointless, showing disrespect for cultural and religious traditions.
suggested_rewrite: Malay wedding traditions carry deep cultural and spiritual significance. While some customs may seem formal, they reflect important values of the community.

input_text: Every time it rains, Unifi goes down. What kind of infrastructure is this? Third world internet in a country that wants to be developed.
reason: Uses 'third world' label to insult Malaysian infrastructure, a polarising and dismissive characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: Internet outages during rainy weather indicate infrastructure that needs improvement. Weatherproofing network equipment should be a priority for TM.

input_text: My neighbour is 40 and just got engaged. The whole taman is gossiping. At that age, just stay single la, less drama.
reason: Participates in age-based gossip and advises someone to give up on marriage at 40.
suggested_rewrite: Getting engaged at 40 is a joyful milestone. It's wonderful that people find love at any stage of life, and they deserve congratulations.

input_text: Why do B40 people keep having children they can't afford? Then they complain about not having enough money. It's basic logic.
reason: Judges B40 reproductive choices and implies they lack basic logic, a classist and dismissive comment.
suggested_rewrite: Family planning support and resources should be accessible to all income groups. Financial challenges are complex and require systemic solutions.

input_text: B40家庭买名牌包包但是讲没钱给孩子补习。这种人活该穷一辈子。
reason: Judges B40 families' spending and says they deserve lifelong poverty, a harsh classist condemnation.
suggested_rewrite: 每个家庭的财务状况不同，理财教育可以帮助各收入阶层做出更好的消费决定。

input_text: 马来西亚的网速真的丢脸。Unifi说100Mbps但实际上连看YouTube都卡。TM就是骗子公司。
reason: Calls TM a scam company and says Malaysian internet is embarrassing, using inflammatory language.
suggested_rewrite: Unifi的实际网速有时未达标。用户可以向MCMC投诉以推动服务改善。

input_text: 读美术系的人以后能做什么？画画能当饭吃吗？还不如去学会计比较实际。
reason: Dismisses art education as impractical and unable to provide a livelihood.
suggested_rewrite: 美术毕业生可以在设计、广告、教育等领域发展。每个专业都有其价值和就业前景。

input_text: 都35岁了还没结婚，是不是太挑了？再等下去就没人要了啦。
reason: Pressures someone for being single at 35, implying they will become undesirable.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人对婚姻有不同的时间规划。35岁依然有充裕的时间找到合适的伴侣。

input_text: 华人婚礼就是比排场。请几百桌但菜色一般般，面子比什么都重要。
reason: Stereotypes Chinese weddings as superficial face-saving events with mediocre food.
suggested_rewrite: 华人婚宴是家庭团聚和分享喜悦的重要场合。每对新人根据自己的预算和喜好来规划婚礼。

input_text: M40的人最可悲，赚不多花不少。买不起好车就别买啦，何必打肿脸充胖子。
reason: Pities and mocks M40 earners for their spending habits, calling them pathetic pretenders.
suggested_rewrite: M40群体面临独特的财务挑战。合理的理财规划可以帮助他们实现更好的生活品质。

input_text: 学音乐学舞蹈的，出来社会都找不到好工作。马来西亚根本不重视艺术，白读了。
reason: Claims arts graduates cannot find good jobs in Malaysia, dismissing the creative sector entirely.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的创意产业正在发展中。音乐和舞蹈专业的毕业生可以在多个领域找到就业机会。

input_text: Unifi每次下雨就断线。这什么烂网络？交了那么多钱等于白交。TM应该赔偿用户。
reason: Calls Unifi a 'rubbish network' and demands compensation in an aggressive tone.
suggested_rewrite: 下雨时Unifi经常断线的问题需要TM正视。用户可以通过正式渠道反馈并要求改善服务。

input_text: B40的人不应该生那么多孩子。养不起就不要生，害了孩子也害了社会。
reason: Dictates reproductive choices of B40 families, implying they burden society by having children.
suggested_rewrite: 家庭计划是个人选择。政府的援助计划旨在确保所有家庭都能获得必要的支持。

input_text: 40岁才结婚的男人，肯定有问题。正常人早就成家了。
reason: Implies men who marry at 40 must have something wrong with them, enforcing age-based judgment.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人对婚姻的规划不同。40岁结婚的人往往更加成熟和稳定。

input_text: 住PPR的人还想创业？先把房租交了再说吧。穷人就该安分守己。
reason: Tells PPR residents to stay in their place and discourages entrepreneurship based on their income status.
suggested_rewrite: PPR居民也有创业的权利和潜力。政府和社会应该提供更多支持来帮助低收入群体实现梦想。

input_text: 马来西亚婚礼请帖写了不来的人，真的很没礼貌。但是来了红包才给RM50更没礼貌。
reason: Judges wedding guests for both not attending and for giving small ang pow amounts, creating social pressure.
suggested_rewrite: 婚礼出席和红包金额都是个人选择。重要的是彼此的祝福和理解。

input_text: Unifi客服电话打了半小时都没人接。这种服务态度，TM不倒闭才奇怪。
reason: Wishes business failure on TM due to customer service frustrations, an overly hostile response.
suggested_rewrite: TM的客服等待时间过长需要改善。提升客服效率对用户体验非常重要。

input_text: 设计系毕业做freelance，月入不稳定还觉得自己很自由。等到没EPF没存款才知道后悔。
reason: Mocks design graduates doing freelance work and predicts they will regret their career choice.
suggested_rewrite: 自由职业需要良好的财务规划。设计领域的自由职业者也可以通过自律和储蓄建立稳定的事业。

input_text: M40的人最爱装。开Honda City但是要贴黑色膜假装是BMW。这种虚荣心真的可笑。
reason: Mocks M40 car owners as vain pretenders, reducing their choices to ridicule.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人根据自己的预算选择车辆。车辆改装是个人喜好，不应该成为嘲笑的理由。

input_text: 35 வயசு ஆச்சு இன்னும் கல்யாணம் பண்ணல. என்ன பிரச்சனை இவளுக்கு? யாருக்கும் பிடிக்கலையோ?
reason: Shames a woman for being unmarried at 35, questioning if something is wrong with her and implying she is unlikeable.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவரும் தங்கள் வாழ்க்கையை தங்கள் நேரத்தில் திட்டமிடுகிறார்கள். திருமணம் என்பது தனிப்பட்ட தேர்வு.

input_text: B40 குடும்பம் புது phone வாங்குது ஆனா பிள்ளைகளுக்கு tuition போட முடியாதாம். இவங்க எப்பவும் ஏழையா தான் இருப்பாங்க.
reason: Stereotypes B40 families as permanently poor due to spending choices, a classist generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு குடும்பத்திற்கும் நிதி சவால்கள் உள்ளன. நிதி கல்வி திட்டங்கள் அனைவருக்கும் உதவியாக இருக்கும்.

input_text: Unifi speed மிகவும் மோசம். RM200 கட்டுறோம் ஆனா YouTube கூட buffer ஆகுது. TM ஒரு scam company.
reason: Calls TM a scam company due to internet speed frustrations, using inflammatory labelling.
suggested_rewrite: Unifi இணைய வேகம் எதிர்பார்ப்புக்கு ஏற்ப இல்லை. MCMC-இல் முறையீடு செய்வது சேவையை மேம்படுத்த உதவும்.

input_text: Fine arts படிச்சு என்ன பண்ணப் போற? Grab driver ஆகலாம். Art-ல career இல்ல Malaysia-ல.
reason: Sarcastically suggests fine arts graduates will become Grab drivers, dismissing creative careers in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Fine arts பட்டதாரிகள் வடிவமைப்பு, விளம்பரம், கல்வி போன்ற பல துறைகளில் வேலை வாய்ப்புகளைப் பெறலாம்.

input_text: இந்து கல்யாணம் மூணு நாள் நடக்கும். யாருக்கு நேரம் இருக்கு? ஒரே நாள்ல முடிச்சா என்ன?
reason: Dismisses multi-day Hindu wedding traditions as inconvenient and unnecessary.
suggested_rewrite: இந்து திருமண சடங்குகள் ஆழமான கலாச்சார மற்றும் ஆன்மீக முக்கியத்துவம் கொண்டவை. ஒவ்வொரு சடங்கும் அர்த்தமுள்ளது.

input_text: 38 வயசு ஆணுக்கு இன்னும் கல்யாணம் ஆகல. நிச்சயம் ஏதோ problem இருக்கும். Normal ஆ இருந்தா already married.
reason: Implies a 38-year-old unmarried man must have a problem, equating marriage with normalcy.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவருக்கும் வாழ்க்கையில் தனிப்பட்ட திட்டங்கள் உள்ளன. திருமணம் செய்யாதது ஒரு குறையல்ல.

input_text: M40 சம்பாதிக்கிறாங்க ஆனா BMW ஓட்டுறாங்க. Mamak-ல சாப்பிடுறாங்க. நடிப்பு வேற யாருக்கும் வேணாம்.
reason: Mocks M40 earners as pretenders who spend on cars but eat cheaply, a classist stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: M40 குழு தனித்துவமான நிதி சவால்களை எதிர்கொள்கிறது. செலவு முடிவுகள் தனிப்பட்டவை.

input_text: PPR-ல இருக்கவங்க business பண்ணணும்-ன்னு சொல்றாங்க. முதல்ல வாடகை கட்டுங்க. ஏழைகள் கனவு காணக்கூடாது.
reason: Tells PPR residents they shouldn't dream of entrepreneurship, implying poor people should not aspire.
suggested_rewrite: PPR குடியிருப்பாளர்களுக்கும் தொழில் தொடங்க சம வாய்ப்பு வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும். அரசின் ஆதரவு முக்கியம்.

input_text: Unifi technician வந்து button press பண்ணிட்டு fixed-ன்னு சொல்றான். அடுத்த நாள் same problem. Useless service.
reason: Calls Unifi service useless and dismisses technicians' work as ineffective.
suggested_rewrite: Unifi தொழில்நுட்ப சேவையின் தரம் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். நிரந்தர தீர்வுகள் வழங்குவது முக்கியம்.

input_text: கல்யாணத்துக்கு RM50,000 செலவழிச்சு ஆனா வீடு வாங்க காசு இல்லையாம். இவங்க priorities-ஐ புரிஞ்சுக்க முடியல.
reason: Judges someone's wedding spending versus home ownership priorities in a dismissive manner.
suggested_rewrite: திருமண செலவுகளும் வீட்டு சேமிப்பும் சமநிலையாக திட்டமிடப்பட வேண்டும். ஒவ்வொருவரும் தங்கள் சூழ்நிலைக்கேற்ப முடிவெடுக்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: B40 tapi nak pakai Unifi plan paling mahal. Lepas tu WiFi slow sikit dah nak marah. You get what you can afford la dey.
reason: Mixes Malay and English to dismiss B40 internet expectations, implying they don't deserve good service based on income.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pengguna berhak mendapat perkhidmatan internet yang setimpal dengan harga yang dibayar, tanpa mengira tahap pendapatan.

input_text: Wah this girl dah 37 still single ah. Confirm terlalu choosy la. Nanti old already no one want liao.
reason: Age-shames a woman in mixed English-Malay-Hokkien, implying she will become undesirable with age.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has their own timeline for relationships. Being selective about a life partner is actually a wise approach.

input_text: Kenduri kahwin dia grand gila tapi hantaran pinjam dari along. Melayu memang gitu la, semua nak show tapi poket kosong.
reason: Stereotypes Malays as showoffs who borrow from loan sharks for weddings, a classist ethnic generalisation.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan kewangan perkahwinan yang bijak dapat mengelakkan hutang. Perkahwinan yang bermakna tidak semestinya perlu berbelanja besar.

input_text: Anak dia study design kat college. Habis duit parents for nothing la. Better go learn coding or something useful.
reason: Calls design studies a waste of parents' money in mixed Malay-English, dismissing creative education.
suggested_rewrite: Design is a growing field with many career opportunities. Both creative and technical skills are valuable in today's economy.

input_text: Unifi rosak lagi ke? Haiya every week same story. TM ni company apa ntah. Useless gila babi.
reason: Uses vulgar mixed-language expression to call TM useless, crossing into personal insult territory.
suggested_rewrite: Weekly Unifi outages are very frustrating. TM perlu menambah baik kestabilan rangkaian secara serius to retain customer trust.

input_text: M40 ni paling kesian la bro. Gaji tak cukup tapi lifestyle nak macam orang kaya. Fake it till you make it konon.
reason: Pities and mocks M40 in mixed Malay-English, portraying them as fake and financially deluded.
suggested_rewrite: The M40 group faces unique financial pressures. Sokongan dan panduan kewangan boleh membantu mereka mencapai keseimbangan.

input_text: Indian wedding 3 hari, Chinese wedding dinner sampai midnight, Malay wedding kena tolong masak. All also leceh la Malaysian weddings.
reason: Dismisses all Malaysian ethnic wedding traditions as troublesome, showing disrespect for multicultural practices.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's diverse wedding traditions reflect our rich multicultural heritage. Each community's customs carry deep meaning and should be appreciated.

input_text: Auntie kat gathering tanya 'Bila nak kahwin?' every single time. I'm 34 la auntie, bukan 24. Mind your own business can ah?
reason: While the frustration is understandable, the aggressive response to elderly relatives normalises dismissive attitudes toward family concern.
suggested_rewrite: Family gatherings sometimes come with personal questions about marriage. It helps to politely set boundaries while appreciating that relatives mean well.

input_text: B40 punya anak pakai Nike RM500 but parents cakap tak mampu bayar school fees. Priorities betul-betul salah these people.
reason: Judges B40 families' spending in mixed Malay-English, using 'these people' to distance and demean.
suggested_rewrite: Spending priorities vary across families. Affordable access to education should be ensured for all children regardless of family income.

input_text: Kerja as freelance photographer, income tak tentu. Parents kena support lagi. Umur 30 dah tapi masih macam budak. Grow up la wei.
reason: Calls a 30-year-old freelancer childish for receiving parental support, dismissing freelance work as immature.
suggested_rewrite: Freelance careers take time to build. Many successful professionals received family support in their early career stages.

input_text: Chinese wedding dinner at RM1800 per table tapi food biasa je. Semua pasal face value. Orang Cina memang macam tu.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese people as obsessed with face value based on wedding dinner pricing.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding dinner costs vary based on venue and menu choices. Each family celebrates according to their preferences and it's not fair to generalise.

input_text: Unifi plan upgrade dah buat tapi speed sama je. Rasa macam kena tipu. TM ni scammer bertauliah la bro.
reason: Calls TM a certified scammer in mixed Malay-English, inflammatory labelling for a service issue.
suggested_rewrite: If speeds don't improve after a plan upgrade, users should contact TM support atau buat aduan rasmi kepada MCMC for resolution.

input_text: Dia ambil degree in creative writing. I was like, bro, you're going to be a barista with that degree la. Waste of time.
reason: Predicts a creative writing graduate will end up as a barista, dismissing their educational choice.
suggested_rewrite: Creative writing graduates work in publishing, media, advertising and many other fields. Every educational path offers unique career opportunities.

input_text: 40 tahun baru nak kahwin. Confirm second hand punya la. Orang baik-baik dah lama taken. So sad for her.
reason: Uses dehumanising 'second hand' language to shame someone marrying at 40, deeply disrespectful.
suggested_rewrite: Finding love at 40 is a beautiful thing. Maturity and life experience often make for stronger, more meaningful relationships.

input_text: PPR residents nak complain pasal lift rosak but they themselves vandal the lift. Orang macam ni memang tak layak duduk rumah elok.
reason: Blames all PPR residents for vandalism and declares them undeserving of decent housing.
suggested_rewrite: Lift maintenance in PPR flats is a shared responsibility. Both residents and management need to work together to keep facilities in good condition.
